title: きさらぎ賞の後に・次はいよいよ……

text_block_list.name: Special Week
choice_data_list: Congrats! That was some nice running out there!
Congrats! That was some nice running out there!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uhh... I felt like I was in some kinda dream, and...
before I knew it, I was at the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, thank you! I've really gotten faster,
haven't I?!
choice_data_list:
Up next is the race you've been waiting for—the
Japanese Derby.

Up next is the race you've been waiting for—the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If we keep working together, I'll get faster and
faster. And then I'll win that race—just you wait
and see!
